eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 4:38 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 5:38 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from Pat's Cabin fire south of Bear Cr Rd, East of Hwy 26, and east of Jefferson county line.. 
Nivel 3 - VAYASE AHORA - Evacue inmediatamente de Pat's Cabin fire south of Bear Cr Rd, East of Hwy 26, and east of Jefferson county line..
